chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5121 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 10.09.2025 Mr. Sandeep Malani AAG -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. It is an old petition of 2023. On the last date of hearing i.e. 26.09.2024, which was almost a year ago, none was present for the petitioner without intimation. Despite lapse of one year, the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today once again none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition. It is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
